description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a rich, dark brown finish. The structure features a wide, open lower shelf and a narrower upper shelf, both supported by thick, curved side panels that give the piece a sturdy and modern appearance. On each side of the central opening, there are three small, evenly spaced cubby shelves, ideal for organizing smaller items. The back of the unit is solid, providing additional support and stability, while the front is completely open for easy access to stored objects. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, contributing to a natural and robust aesthetic. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, and the overall design is simple yet functional, suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A dark brown wooden shelving unit with open shelves, side cubbies, and a solid back, designed for sturdy and accessible storage. Its curved side panels and visible wood grain give it a modern, robust look.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, three cubby shelves on each side, and the wide lower and upper surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, curved side panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the structure of the cubby shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved side panel and shelf depth seen in view 1.
